quotes.text: Call me Ishmael.
It is not down in any map; true places never are.
I know not all that may be coming, but be it what it will, I'll go to it laughing.
Better sleep with a sober cannibal than a drunken Christian.
Ignorance is the parent of fear.
A whale-ship was my Yale College and my Harvard.
From hell's heart I stab at thee; for hate's sake I spit my last breath at thee.
Think not, is my eleventh commandment; and sleep when you can, is my twelfth.
There are certain queer times and occasions in this strange mixed affair we call life when a man takes this whole universe for a vast practical joke.
To produce a mighty book, you must choose a mighty theme.
I try all things, I achieve what I can.
For there is no folly of the beast of the earth which is not infinitely outdone by the madness of men.
All visible objects, man, are but as pasteboard masks.
There is a wisdom that is woe; but there is a woe that is madness.
There are some enterprises in which a careful disorderliness is the true method.
Ahab is for ever Ahab, man. This whole act's immutably decreed.
The path to my fixed purpose is laid with iron rails, whereon my soul is grooved to run.
I am tormented with an everlasting itch for things remote.
Talk not to me of blasphemy, man; I'd strike the sun if it insulted me.
Whenever I find myself growing grim about the mouth; whenever it is a damp, drizzly November in my soul, I account it high time to get to sea as soon as I can.
God keep me from ever completing anything. This whole book is but a draught—nay, but the draught of a draught.
Death is only a launching into the region of the strange Untried.
Better it is to perish in that howling infinite, than be ingloriously dashed upon the lee, even if that were safety!
It is not the ship so much as the skilful steering that assures the prosperous voyage.
To enjoy bodily warmth, some small part of you must be cold, for there is no quality in this world that is not what it is merely by contrast.
Methinks we have hugely mistaken this matter of Life and Death. Methinks that what they call my shadow here on earth is my true substance.
I would prefer not to.
It is better to fail in originality than to succeed in imitation.
I have written a wicked book, and feel spotless as the lamb.
The Past is the textbook of tyrants; the Future the Bible of the Free.
Silence is the only Voice of our God.
Of all the pre-adamite whales yet exhumed, by far the largest is the Alabama one mentioned in Owen's Geology.
For small erections may be finished by their first architects; grand ones, true ones, ever leave the capstone to posterity.
The sea had jeeringly kept his finite body up, but drowned the infinite of his soul.
And thus, through the courage and great skill in obstetrics of Queequeg, the deliverance, or rather, delivery of Tashtego was successfully accomplished.
How it is I know not; but there is no place like a bed for confidential disclosures between friends.
In this world, shipmates, sin that pays its way can travel freely, and without a passport; whereas Virtue, if a pauper, is stopped at all frontiers.
There is one knows not what sweet mystery about this sea, whose gently awful stirrings seem to speak of some hidden soul beneath.
Oh, grassy glades! oh, ever vernal endless landscapes in the soul; in ye—though long parched by the dead drought of the earthy life—in ye, men yet may roll, like young horses in new morning clover.
I am the Fates' lieutenant; I act under orders.
